title: Feature: Complete DESIGN.md compliance for web UI

steps.description: Add array length type-change detection to diff algorithm. When both values are arrays with different lengths, emit type-change with oldType array[N] and newType array[M] instead of changed.
steps.done_condition: bun test passes; new test case for array length change returns type-change

steps.description: Add /api/guide endpoint handler to web adapter that accepts POST with old, new, baseVersion, revisionVersion, sunsetDate and returns the full MigrationGuide JSON including checklist items and code examples.

Add summary chips, filter buttons, and click-to-expand code examples to the web UI diff table. Summary chips show counts per change type with colored badges. Filter buttons: all, breaking, removed, renamed, moved, type-change, changed, added. Clicking a row toggles a code example panel below it. All rendering via createElement + textContent (ADR-004).
steps.done_condition: Web UI shows summary chips, filter buttons work, row click expands code examples

steps.description: Build the migration guide viewer in the web UI. Add a 'Generate Guide' button that POSTs to /api/guide and renders: (1) timeline component showing deprecated → migration window → sunset, (2) change sections with severity badges and summaries, (3) interactive checklist with checkboxes, (4) progress bar showing completion %. Checklist state stored in localStorage keyed by btoa(baseVersion:revisionVersion). All rendering via createElement + textContent (ADR-004).
steps.done_condition: Guide viewer renders timeline, changes, checklist with localStorage persistence and progress bar

steps.description: Add 'Export as Markdown' button to the guide viewer. Generates a .md file with guide title, timeline, each change (summary + severity), and checklist items with [x]/[ ] markers. Triggers browser download.
steps.done_condition: Clicking Export downloads a valid .md file with all guide sections

steps.description: Add unit tests for array type-change detection and integration test verifying the full web UI flow: load sample → compare → filter → generate guide → check items → verify localStorage → export markdown.
steps.done_condition: bun test passes with all new tests; all 10 specs covered

mergeOrder: step-2, step-3 parallel (both tier 2, independent adapter work)
step-4 after step-2 + step-3 (guide viewer needs both)
step-5 after step-4 (export needs guide viewer)

riskRegister.risk: Large HTML string in web-adapter.ts becomes unwieldy
riskRegister.mitigation: Extract HTML generation into separate functions; keep under 150 lines per function

riskRegister.risk: innerHTML usage creeps in during guide viewer rendering
riskRegister.mitigation: ADR-004 enforced by pre-commit hook; all rendering uses createElement + textContent

riskRegister.risk: localStorage key collision between different guide versions
riskRegister.mitigation: Key includes btoa(base:revision) per DESIGN.md spec

successCriteria: hex analyze returns A+ with 0 boundary violations
Web UI renders summary chips, filters, code examples, guide viewer with checklist, progress bar, and markdown export
Checklist state survives browser refresh via localStorage
